title: Google to invest up to $40B in Anthropic in cash and compute
summary: Google plans a major investment of up to $40 billion in Anthropic as AI companies intensify competition for computational resources, following Anthropic's limited release of its cybersecurity-focused Mythos model. This investment underscores the strategic importance of securing compute capacity in the rapidly advancing AI sector.
content: Google plans up to $40B investment in Anthropic as AI rivals race to secure massive compute capacity, following the limited release of its powerful, cybersecurity-focused Mythos model.

zh.title: 谷歌计划向Anthropic投资高达400亿美元用于现金和算力
zh.summary: 随着AI公司争夺计算资源的竞争加剧，谷歌计划向Anthropic进行高达400亿美元的重大投资。此前Anthropic发布了其专注于网络安全的Mythos模型的有限版本。这项投资突显了在快速发展的AI领域中确保算力容量的战略重要性。

title: Soldier won $410K in Polymarket bets on timing of Maduro capture, US alleges
summary: A soldier faces legal consequences after allegedly winning $410,000 in bets on a prediction market by wagering on the timing of Nicolás Maduro's capture. Trump likened the situation to Pete Rose betting on his own team, raising questions about insider trading in prediction markets.
content: It's like "Pete Rose betting on his own team," Trump says of arrested soldier.

zh.title: 美国指控士兵通过Polymarket预测市场对马杜罗被捕时间的押注赢得41万美元
zh.summary: 一名士兵因涉嫌在预测市场上押注尼古拉斯·马杜罗被捕的时间而赢得41万美元而面临法律后果。特朗普将这种情况比作皮特·罗斯对自己的球队进行赌博，引发了对预测市场中内幕交易的质疑。

title: BMW is one step closer to selling you a color-changing car
summary: BMW unveiled the iX3 Flow Edition at the 2026 Beijing Auto Show, advancing its color-changing vehicle concept with E Ink panel technology and moving closer to production. The new approach refines BMW's previous designs and demonstrates practical progress toward commercially viable dynamic-color vehicles.
content:
It’s not quite the color-changing car that’s been teased, but BMW’s new BMW iX3 Flow Edition brings us closer. | Image: BMW	

At CES 2022, BMW debuted its BMW iX Flow concept car that could dynamically change its appearance using the same grayscale E Ink panels found in e-readers like the Kindle. It was followed by the BMW i Vision Dee concept and the BMW i5 Flow Nostokana that were both upgraded with color E Ink panels. Its latest concept, the BMW iX3 Flow Edition announced at the 2026 Beijing Auto Show, might look slightly less ambitious but it takes a new approach, pushing color-changing cars closer to actual production.
BMW's previous concepts wrapped the entire vehicle in a patchwork of E Ink panels that were all custom-sized and shaped to match its contours. …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 宝马距离向你销售变色汽车又近了一步
zh.summary: 宝马在2026年北京国际车展上推出了iX3 Flow Edition，利用电子墨水屏技术推进其变色汽车概念，并朝着生产迈进一步。新的设计方案改进了宝马之前的设计，展示了向商业可行的动态变色车型发展的实际进展。

title: Google’s handsome Pixel Watch 4 is on sale for $40 off in both size configurations
summary: Google is offering $40 discounts on the Pixel Watch 4 in both 41mm and 45mm configurations through April 26 as part of spring promotions on first-party devices. The watch features a bright 3,000-nit display, exceptional 45-hour battery life, and full integration with Google services and Gemini.
content:
Spring has sprung, as they say, and to mark the occasion, Google is running a spring-centric promo until Sunday, April 26th. The limited-time discounts apply to a number of Google’s first-party devices, from the Pixel 10 Pro to the Pixel Buds Pro 2, as well as the wearables like the Pixel Watch 4. In fact, Google’s latest watch is on sale at Amazon, Best Buy, and the Google Store in its 41mm / Wi-Fi configuration starting at $309.99 ($40 off) — or in the 45mm config for $359.99 ($40 off) — which is one of the better prices we’ve seen in recent months.
Google Pixel Watch 4

Where to Buy:

 $349.99 $309.99 at Amazon (41mm, Wi-Fi)
 $349.99 $309.99 at Google (41mm, Wi-Fi)
 $399.99 $359.99 at Amazon (45mm, Wi-Fi)

We’ve said it before, and we’ll say it again: the Pixel Watch 4 is the Android watch to beat. Google’s newest wearable still works best for Pixel phone owners, though its overall performance, attractive 3,000-nit domed display, and host of upgrades over the third-gen model make it a suitable option for pretty much everyone. You still get a wide range of health and fitness tools, allowing you to track everything from your blood oxygen levels to your heart rate, along with the ability to automatically record certain cardio activities for at least 15 minutes. It also features emergency satellite SOS (in the case of an emergency) and dual-frequency GPS, the latter of which provides improved navigation in challenging environments such as cities and dense forests.
Unsurprisingly, the Pixel Watch 4 integrates well with Google’s slate of services — Google Maps, Google Wallet, Google Assistant, etc., etc. — and works with Gemini, now quickly accessible from your wrist using a convenient raise-to-talk gesture. It also benefits from a new speaker, a bigger battery, and a power-efficient processor, which, in our initial testing, allowed us to eke out a commendable 45 hours of battery life with the 45mm model. Much of the watch is now repairable, too, so should you ever bre

zh.title: 谷歌精美的Pixel Watch 4在两种尺寸上优惠$40
zh.summary: 作为春季首方设备促销的一部分，谷歌在41mm和45mm配置的Pixel Watch 4上提供$40折扣，优惠期至4月26日。该手表配备3,000尼特的亮屏、45小时电池续航，并与谷歌服务和Gemini完全集成。

title: Meet the 19-meter Cretaceous kraken that swam with mosasaurs
summary: Researchers have discovered a massive 19-meter Cretaceous-era squid-like creature that coexisted with mosasaurs, revealed through careful excavation of its fossilized jaw remains. The find provides new insights into ancient marine predators and ecosystem dynamics.
content: Layer by layer, researchers revealed the jaws of an ancient predator.

zh.title: 认识与沧龙共游的19米白垩纪大章鱼
zh.summary: 研究人员通过仔细挖掘其化石下颚遗骸，发现了一个与沧龙共存的白垩纪时代的巨大19米长乌贼状生物。这一发现为古代海洋捕食者和生态系统动态提供了新的见解。

title: The RAM shortage could get even worse if Samsung labor protests cut production
summary: Samsung faces potential production disruptions after 40,000 union members rallied demanding higher wages and improved compensation, with an 18-day strike threatened if negotiations fail. A successful strike could worsen the global RAM shortage already driven by AI datacenter demand, further raising memory prices.
content:
Samsung employees in South Korea are protesting for more competitive wages. | Photo: Seong Joon Cho / Bloomberg via Getty Images	

The RAM shortage caused by demand from AI datacenters is already driving up prices on phones, PS5s, and Raspberry Pis, but it could be about to get even worse. Samsung is facing employee protests over demands for wages that are more competitive with rival chip manufacturer SK Hynix, including removing Samsung's cap on bonus pay, allocating more money for bonuses, and raising base salaries. According to AP News, an estimated 40,000 union members attended a rally on Thursday outside Samsung's Pyeongtaek, South Korea chip manufacturing facility.
If the union and management can't come to an agreement, the union is planning an 18-day strike begi …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 如果三星劳动抗议减少产量，内存短缺可能恶化
zh.summary: 在4万名工会成员举行集会要求提高工资和改善待遇后，三星面临潜在的生产中断风险，如果谈判失败将威胁进行18天罢工。成功的罢工可能加剧全球内存短缺（已受AI数据中心需求驱动），进一步推高内存价格。

title: How Project Maven taught the military to love AI
summary: Project Maven, initiated in 2017 as a military AI system for analyzing drone footage, evolved into a critical targeting tool that enabled rapid strikes during recent Middle East operations. The project sparked protests at Google, the original contractor, highlighting ongoing tensions over AI militarization.
content:
In the first 24 hours of the assault on Iran, the US military struck more than 1,000 targets, nearly double the scale of the "shock and awe" attack on Iraq over two decades ago. This acceleration was made possible by AI systems that speed up the targeting process. Chief among them is the Maven Smart System.
In her new book, Project Maven: A Marine Colonel, His Team, and the Dawn of AI Warfare, journalist Katrina Manson investigates the development of Maven from its inception in 2017 as an experiment in applying computer vision to drone footage. The project spurred employee protests at Google, the military's initial contractor, prompting the …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Project Maven如何让军方爱上了AI
zh.summary: Project Maven项目于2017年启动，最初是一个用于分析无人机视频的军事AI系统，后来演变成了关键的目标指定工具，在最近的中东行动中实现快速打击。该项目在原始承包商谷歌引发抗议，突显了关于AI军事化的持续紧张关系。

title: Report: Samsung execs worried company could lose money on smartphones for the first time
summary: Samsung executives worry the company could post its first-ever loss on smartphone business due to the AI-driven memory shortage pressuring profit margins. The chip scarcity is creating significant financial headwinds across Samsung's consumer electronics operations.
content: The AI-driven memory shortage is hitting Samsung's bottom line.

zh.title: 报告：三星高管担心公司可能首次在智能手机业务上亏损
zh.summary: 三星高管担心该公司可能首次在智能手机业务上蒙受损失，原因是AI驱动的存储芯片短缺压低了利润率。芯片短缺正在对三星消费电子业务造成重大财务压力。

title: Marked-up Mac minis flood eBay amid shortages driven by AI
summary: Apple's sold-out Mac mini is driving inflated eBay listings as demand surges among AI enthusiasts seeking compact desktops for running local AI models. The shortage reflects growing consumer interest in edge AI computing and personal deployments.
content: Apple’s sold-out Mac mini is spawning marked-up eBay listings as demand surges for the compact desktop, now favored for running local AI models and tools.

zh.title: 标价虚高的Mac mini在AI驱动短缺中充斥eBay
zh.summary: 苹果已售罄的Mac mini推动了eBay上的溢价列表，因为AI爱好者需求激增，他们在寻求紧凑台式机来运行本地AI模型。这种短缺反映了消费者对边缘AI计算和个人部署的日益增长的兴趣。

title: Xreal’s best AR glasses are $599 for good now
summary: Xreal permanently reduced its One Pro AR glasses from $649 to $599, positioning them $150 above the entry-level 1S model with superior optics and display technology. The glasses feature micro-OLED panels, 57-degree field of view, and project a virtual display equivalent to a 171-inch screen.
content:
Vee looks better than I do wearing the One Pro, but anyone’s going to look a little silly. | Photo by Amelia Holowaty Krales / The Verge	

The Xreal One Pro are the company’s best AR glasses, touting thin optics that keep out reflections so you can enjoy a crisp, contrast-rich image of whatever content you’re watching. Xreal has permanently cut their price from $649 to $599, making them $150 more than its entry-level (but still good) 1S glasses that debuted shortly after CES 2026. You can find the One Pro in stock at Amazon, Best Buy, and from Xreal itself.
The 1S and One Pro share a well-built design in common, not to mention some identical features. Both have the X1 chip, allowing for three degrees of freedom (3DoF) that lets you anchor your content in virtual space, and both support Real 3D, which applies a surprisingly good 3D effect to 2D content.
Xreal One Pro
The Xreal One Pro project a huge virtual display that feels like a 171-inch screen, using micro-OLED panels, a 57-degree field of view, and a 120Hz refresh rate. Powered by Xreal’s X1 chip, the smart glasses offer low-latency tracking with optional 6DoF spatial anchoring so your screen stays fixed in place. They also feature built-in speakers and work with a wide range of USB-C devices.

Where to Buy:

 $599 at Amazon
 $599 at Best Buy
 $599 at Xreal

If you’re tempted by the idea of having a big, private screen to watch movies, TV shows, and video games on, I recently published a piece that compares the One Pro to Xreal’s cheaper 1S, as well as to Viture’s similarly-priced Beast glasses. The One Pro are most similar to the Beast glasses in terms of visual fidelity, but for a multitude of reasons I get into in the piece, there’s no perfect pair of glasses yet. However, it’s nice that Xreal’s best AR glasses just got a little cheaper.

zh.title: Xreal最佳AR眼镜现已永久降价至$599
zh.summary: Xreal将其One Pro AR眼镜从$649永久降价至$599,定位于比入门级1S型号高$150,并具有更优越的光学和显示技术。这款眼镜采用微型OLED面板,57度视场角,可投影出相当于171英寸屏幕的虚拟显示。

title: 360-degree cameras have a new superpower
summary: Insta360 partnered with UK startup Splatica to enable creators to easily convert 360-degree camera footage into photorealistic 3D environments using Gaussian splatting technology. The service democratizes 3D environment creation, requiring only consumer-level hardware and a subscription.
content:
Imagine Google Street View, except you can walk around like it's a video game. Now imagine you don't need to wait for Google to come film because it's completely DIY. Insta360, the leading maker of 360-degree cameras, is now partnered with a 12-person UK startup called Splatica to help creators do just that.
Last January, we wrote about Gaussian splatting, the tech that promises to someday let anyone digitally re-create chunks of the real world in photorealistic 3D. But Splatica is making it surprisingly easy to harness splats today - with nothing more than an off-the-shelf consumer 360-degree camera and a subscription service that handles  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 360度相机拥有新的超级能力
zh.summary: Insta360与英国初创公司Splatica合作,使创作者能够使用高斯泼溅技术轻松将360度相机素材转换为逼真的3D环境。该服务民主化了3D环境创建,只需消费级硬件和订阅即可实现。

title: Tesla’s Cybercab goes into production — so why is Musk tapping the brakes?
summary: Tesla began continuous production of its Cybercab robotaxi at the Austin Gigafactory in April 2026, though Elon Musk expressed unusual caution about the rollout timeline. The slower-than-expected development casts uncertainty over Tesla's autonomous vehicle ambitions.
content:
Tesla's Cybercab is now in production at the company's Gigafactory in Austin, Texas, but Elon Musk is sounding unusually cautious about the rollout. 
The robotaxi's start of production was announced Thursday on X, with Tesla posting a video shot from inside a steering wheel-less Cybercab as it drove out of the factory with the caption, "Purpose built for autonomy." The company made a few initial Cybercabs back in February, but continuous production only started this month. 
But with the company's robotaxi plans creeping along much slower than expected, many Tesla watchers are left scratching their heads about the future - especially as Mus …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 特斯拉Cybercab开始生产——为什么马斯克踩刹车?
zh.summary: 特斯拉于2026年4月在奥斯汀超级工厂开始Cybercab无人出租车的连续生产,但埃隆·马斯克对推出时间表表示了不寻常的谨慎。比预期缓慢的开发进度给特斯拉的自动驾驶野心投下了阴影。

title: Nuclear startup X-energy raises $1B in data center-driven IPO
summary: Amazon-backed nuclear startup X-energy raised approximately $1 billion in its IPO, exceeding initial targets by roughly 20% on strong demand for nuclear power supporting data centers. The funding reflects growing recognition of nuclear energy's critical role in powering AI infrastructure.
content: Amazon-backed X-energy was able to raise around 20% more money in its IPO as demand for nuclear power surges.

zh.title: 核能初创公司X-energy在数据中心驱动的IPO中融资10亿美元
zh.summary: 亚马逊支持的核能初创公司X-energy在其IPO中融资约10亿美元，超过初始目标约20%，受到数据中心对核电需求的强劲推动。这笔融资反映了人们越来越认识到核能在为AI基础设施供电中的关键作用。

title: Man faces 5 years in prison for using AI to fake sighting of runaway wolf
summary: A man faces up to five years in prison for creating AI-generated images of a runaway wolf to deceive the public. The case marks a legal precedent for AI-enabled wildlife misinformation and demonstrates criminal consequences for sophisticated deepfakes.
content: Beloved wolf gripped the nation after burrowing out of the zoo.

zh.title: 男子因使用AI伪造逃脱狼目击事件面临5年监禁
zh.summary: 一名男子因创建AI生成的逃脱狼图像来欺骗公众而面临最多五年监禁。该案例标志着AI驱动野生动物虚假信息的法律先例，并展示了复杂深伪的刑事后果。

title: Well, this is embarrassing: The Lunar Gateway's primary modules are corroded
summary: NASA's Lunar Gateway project has encountered corrosion on its primary modules, with preliminary findings suggesting multiple environmental factors contributed to the damage. The discovery raises durability concerns for long-term lunar infrastructure development.
content: "Preliminary findings indicate that the issue likely results from a combination of factors."

zh.title: 嗯，这很尴尬：月球门户的主要模块已腐蚀
zh.summary: 美国宇航局的月球门户项目在其主要模块上遇到腐蚀问题，初步调查结果表明多个环境因素导致了这一损害。这一发现引发了人们对长期月球基础设施开发耐久性的担忧。

title: In another wild turn for AI chips, Meta signs deal for millions of Amazon AI CPUs
summary: Meta has secured a significant portion of Amazon's custom-built CPUs for AI agent workloads, marking a shift from traditional GPU competition. This deal signals growing diversification in AI chip manufacturing and increased competition among cloud providers in building custom infrastructure.
content: Meta has commandeered a big chunk of Amazon's homegrown CPUs (not GPUs) for AI agentic workloads, signaling that a new kind of chip race has begun.

zh.title: 在AI芯片的又一次戏剧性转折中，Meta与亚马逊签署数百万AI CPU交易
zh.summary: Meta已确保获得亚马逊定制AI CPU的大量份额用于AI代理工作负载，标志着从传统GPU竞争的转变。这项交易表明AI芯片制造的多样化增长，以及云服务商在构建定制基础设施方面的竞争加剧。

title: Elon Musk and Sam Altman’s court showdown will dish the dirt
summary: Elon Musk, OpenAI's co-founder, is suing the company and CEO Sam Altman over allegations of fraud and breach of contract, with trial scheduled to begin April 27th in Oakland. The lawsuit stems from Musk's departure after being passed over for CEO and reflects broader tensions about OpenAI's commercialization and direction.
content:
Might as well jump, as the poet David Lee Roth once said. | Image: Cath Virginia / The Verge	

Elon Musk cofounded OpenAI, and then flounced off in a huff when he wasn't anointed CEO, leaving Sam Altman as the last power-hungry man standing. Now, Musk is back with a lawsuit, and a trial is scheduled to start in Oakland, California, on April 27th. Theoretically, it's a legal case about whether OpenAI defrauded Musk. But that's not really what we're all doing here. This is about mess. 
Over the past couple of years, Musk's legal theories for punishing OpenAI have run the gamut from breach of contract to unfair business practices to false advertising. Now, he and Altman will be getting called to the stand at a particularly delicate time …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 埃隆·马斯克与萨姆·阿尔特曼的法庭对决将揭露真相
zh.summary: OpenAI联合创始人埃隆·马斯克以欺诈和违反合同为由起诉该公司和CEO萨姆·阿尔特曼，审判定于4月27日在奥克兰开始。此诉讼源于马斯克因未被选为CEO而离职，反映了围绕OpenAI商业化和方向的更广泛的紧张关系。

title: Instagram has launched another Snapchat clone
summary: Instagram has launched "Instants," a new dedicated app in Italy and Spain featuring 24-hour disappearing photos viewable only once, mirroring Snapchat functionality. The app continues Meta's strategy of rapidly adopting competitor features across its social media portfolio.
content:
Instagram is testing a new dedicated app that's focused around Snapchat-like photo sharing features. The app, called "Instants," was launched in Italy and Spain yesterday, Business Insider reports, and allows users to send each other disappearing photos that are available for 24 hours and can be viewed only once during that window.
The app is currently available on both iOS and Android. Meta hasn't announced if a desktop version will follow, or whether Instants will be launched in other regions, including the US. It resembles the "Shots" instant photo sharing feature that is already baked into Instagram messages (and was later rebranded to  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Instagram推出了又一个Snapchat克隆应用
zh.summary: Instagram在意大利和西班牙推出了"Instants"新应用，该应用具有24小时消失的照片功能且仅可查看一次，镜像了Snapchat的功能。该应用延续了Meta在其社交媒体产品组合中快速采用竞争对手功能的战略。

title: Rocket Report: Artemis III rocket getting ready; SpaceX is now an AI company
summary: NASA's Artemis III rocket is advancing through preparation stages while SpaceX expands its operational focus to include artificial intelligence capabilities. This brief update highlights concurrent developments in the commercial and government space sectors.
content: "If it doesn’t rely on a solid, there’s no reason why we can’t launch."

zh.title: 火箭报告：阿尔忒弥斯III火箭准备就绪；SpaceX现已成为人工智能公司
zh.summary: 美国航天局的阿尔忒弥斯III火箭正在推进准备阶段，而SpaceX则将其运营重点扩展到包括人工智能能力。这次简要更新突出了商业和政府航天部门的并发发展。

title: China’s DeepSeek previews new AI model a year after jolting US rivals
summary: Chinese AI company DeepSeek previewed its V4 model, claiming parity with leading US systems from Anthropic, Google, and OpenAI, with notable improvements in coding. The release demonstrates China's advances in AI development and compatibility with domestic Huawei chip technology.
content:
Chinese AI company DeepSeek released a preview of its hotly anticipated next-generation AI model V4 on Friday, saying that the open-source model can compete with leading closed-source systems from US rivals including Anthropic, Google, and OpenAI.
DeepSeek says V4 marks a major improvement over prior models, especially in coding, a capability that has become central to AI agents and helped drive the success of tools like ChatGPT Codex and Claude Code. The release is also a milestone for China's chip industry, with DeepSeek explicitly highlighting compatibility with domestic Huawei technology.
  
The release comes a year after DeepSeek rattl …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 中国DeepSeek在震撼美国竞争对手一年后推出新的人工智能模型
zh.summary: 中国人工智能公司DeepSeek推出其V4模型，声称与Anthropic、Google和OpenAI等领先的美国系统相当，在编码方面有显著改进。该发布展示了中国在人工智能发展中的进展以及与国内华为芯片技术的兼容性。

title: Prestigious photo contest answers ‘what is a photo?’
summary: The 2026 World Press Photo award went to "Separated by ICE" by Carol Guzy, depicting children with their father after an immigration hearing, amid debates over AI's role in photojournalism. The competition enforces strict rules limiting AI tool use to preserve documentary authenticity.
content:
The three finalists for the World Press Photo of the year. | Image: World Press Photo	

We love to muse over how "real" photography is defined here at The Verge now that generative AI is so prolific, and the World Press Photo competition might have the answer. The prestigious award celebrates the best of photojournalism, where capturing reality is paramount. 
The winning entry for 2026 - "Separated by ICE," captured by photojournalist Carol Guzy - was announced yesterday. The harrowing photograph shows children clinging to their father after an immigration hearing. The photo had to abide by specific rules around the use of AI tools to be eligible for the competition, with the independent, nonprofit organization behind the awar …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 享有盛誉的摄影竞赛回答"什么是照片？"
zh.summary: 2026年世界新闻摄影奖授予Carol Guzy的《被冰隔开》，该作品描绘了孩子们在移民听证会后与父亲在一起，在关于人工智能在摄影新闻中的作用的辩论中。该竞赛实施严格规则，限制人工智能工具的使用以保持纪录片的真实性。

title: Saros is pure action nirvana
summary: Saros is an action-focused video game set on a visually striking alien world dominated by golden hues and precious amber resources, where players navigate frequent death sequences. The game combines immersive aesthetics with challenging combat mechanics in the dangerous wilds of Carcosa.
content:
The alien world of Saros feels like it has been touched by King Midas. The sky is golden after another impossibly frequent solar eclipse; rocks, specifically those of the precious resource Lucenite, radiate a shimmering amber. Even the body of our gruff hero Arjun Devraj (played by Rahul Kohli) is liable to turn deep, opulent yellow as he ventures further into the wilds of Carcosa. Should he die (a regular occurrence), the game cuts to stranger, more cryptic images, one of which is a double bed covered in gold silk sheets. 
It's a fittingly blingy aesthetic for this time when gaming has scarcely been a more gilded activity (seriously, have  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Saros是纯粹的动作天堂
zh.summary: Saros是一款以动作为中心的视频游戏，背景设定在视觉上引人注目的外星世界，以金色色调和珍贵琥珀资源为主。玩家需要应对频繁的死亡场景，游戏将沉浸式美学与挑战性的战斗机制相结合，在危险的卡塔萨荒野中展开。

title: Porsche is adding an all-electric Cayenne coupe to its lineup
summary: Porsche will begin selling the Cayenne Coupe Electric in late summer, expanding its luxury electric SUV lineup. This move reflects the automotive industry's continued shift toward electrification of premium models.
content: Porsche will start selling the Cayenne Coupe Electric in late summer.

zh.title: 保时捷正在为其产品线增加全电动Cayenne跑车
zh.summary: 保时捷将在夏末开始销售Cayenne Coupe Electric，扩展其豪华电动SUV产品线。这一举措反映了汽车行业继续向高端车型电气化转变的趋势。

title: Bob Iger rejoins Thrive Capital as advisor after Disney exit
summary: Bob Iger, the former Disney CEO, is returning to Thrive Capital as an advisor, a firm in which he already holds a stake and previously worked as a venture partner. This move comes after his exit from Disney and signals his continued involvement in the venture capital space.
content: The former Disney CEO hold a stake in Thrive, and has previously held the role of the venture partner at the firm.

zh.title: Bob Iger在迪士尼离职后重新加入Thrive Capital担任顾问
zh.summary: 前迪士尼首席执行官Bob Iger正在以顾问身份重新加入Thrive Capital，这家公司他已持股且曾担任创投合伙人。此举发生在他离开迪士尼之后，表明他继续参与风险投资领域的意愿。
